name: zipher-mcp-server
title: Zipher — Shielded Wallet for AI Agents
description: Headless Zcash wallet with encrypted vault, spending policies, and x402 paywall access

tools.name: wallet_status
tools.description: Get wallet balance, sync height, seed source, and lock state

tools.name: wallet_lock
tools.description: Clear seed from memory — wallet becomes read-only until unlocked

tools.name: wallet_unlock
tools.description: Re-decrypt seed from vault and restore wallet operations

tools.name: propose_send
tools.description: Create a shielded ZEC transaction proposal (policy-checked, not yet signed)

tools.name: confirm_send
tools.description: Sign and broadcast a proposed transaction

tools.name: approve_send
tools.description: Approve a transaction flagged for human-in-the-loop review

tools.name: get_pending_approval
tools.description: Check if a transaction is awaiting human approval

tools.name: pay_url
tools.description: Pay an x402/MPP paywall — auto-detects protocol, pays, returns response

tools.name: session_open
tools.description: Open a prepaid session with a CipherPay-enabled API

tools.name: session_request
tools.description: Make a request using an active prepaid session

tools.name: swap_quote
tools.description: Get a cross-chain swap quote (ZEC to any asset via Near Intents)

tools.name: set_policy
tools.description: Update spending policy (per-tx limit, daily cap, approval threshold, allowlist)
